goal: Add sum.js exporting sum(a,b)=a+b with a passing node:test

sprints.title: Implement sum module
sprints.description: Create sum.js at the project root that exports a function sum(a, b) returning a + b. Use CommonJS module.exports (or ESM export, matching the project's existing module style) so the function can be imported by test files. Keep the implementation minimal and correct for numeric inputs.

sprints.title: Add and verify node:test coverage
sprints.description: Create a test file (e.g. sum.test.js) that imports the sum function and uses the built-in node:test module with node:assert to verify representative cases such as sum(2, 3) === 5. Run the suite via `node --test` and confirm all tests pass, adjusting the module import style if needed so the test executes cleanly.
